config.cfg_repr: V2Params(exposure_mapping='percentile', logistic_midpoint=0.0, logistic_steepness=0.6, cognitive_feasibility=0.3, physical_feasibility=0.2, robotics_maturity=0.0, adoption=1.0, adoption_path=[np.float64(0.05), np.float64(0.07500000000000001), np.float64(0.1), np.float64(0.125), np.float64(0.15000000000000002), np.float64(0.175), np.float64(0.2), np.float64(0.22500000000000003), np.float64(0.25), np.float64(0.275), np.float64(0.3), np.float64(0.325), np.float64(0.35000000000000003), np.float64(0.375), np.float64(0.4)], robotics_cognitive_coupling=0.0, robotics_lag=4.0, robotics_base=1.0, sector_adoption_mult=1.0, sector_adoption_ceiling=1.0, task_job_passthrough=1.0, retained_profit_share=0.7, price_reduction_share=0.2, survivor_gains_share=0.10000000000000003, auto_cost=0.1, offshore_share=0.0, compute_effective_rate=0.27, ui_weeks=26, reabsorption_rate=0.075, reabsorption_rung=1, reemployment_haircut=0.25, reabsorption_floor_pctile=0.3, reab_wage_baumol=0.0, reab_wage_crowding=0.0, lfp_exit_rate=0.1, survivor_elasticity=-0.3, survivor_raise_ceiling=1.5, survivor_spillover_to_profit=0.5, mpc=0.95, consumption_stickiness=1.0, marginal_taxable_multiplier=1.0, demand_multiplier=1.5, price_passthrough=0.3, productivity_passthrough=0.2, denominator='absolute', automation_tax_rate=0.0027, attrition_rate=0.04, ssdi_annual=18000.0, baseline_growth_rate=0.035, income_tax_mult=1.0, corp_tax_mult=1.0, cons_tax_mult=1.0, ubi_recapture_rate=0.25, surplus_capture=1.0, dividend_tax_rate=0.188, passthrough_individual_rate=0.25, state_response='mix', state_cut_share=0.0, state_rate_hike_cap=1.0, interest_rate=0.03, ubi_annual=0.0, swf_profit_share=0.2, fed_vat_rate=0.05, corp_offset_scale=1.0, consumption_scale=1.0, n_periods=15)
overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 10% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0027 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo
SWF: the government holds a 20% equity share of after-corporate-tax automation profit — revenue scales automatically with the shock (the insurance property)
Federal VAT: 5% on a consumption base of two-thirds of value added, eroding with the standing income withdrawal (no behavioral response modeled)

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 8.0 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 1.5× the entire Apollo program, every year — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.jobs: ≈ 0.9× the jobs lost at the COVID trough
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 0.9 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 0.7 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.4× the entire Apollo program, every year
